text:
It was so much fun meeting everyone at @pawradise.park so let’s hang out again soon!

Our next meetup will be at @secretpizzala on Father’s Day June 21st from 5-7pm! 

If you’re not already in the @littlelionsocialla group chat, please leave a comment so we can add you! We will be using the chat to coordinate how many pizzas to get 😋

#shihtzu #losangelesshihtzus
